description: Content Intelligence System - Scrape tracked accounts (LinkedIn/Twitter via Apify), track blogs via RSS, feed content to LLM for posting suggestions with persona context (CEO/CTO/CRO)

userStories.title: Add ContentSource and ContentPost models to Prisma schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database models to store tracked content sources (LinkedIn, Twitter, Blog/RSS) and their scraped posts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ContentSource model with fields: id, name, platform (linkedin|twitter|blog), url, rssFeedUrl (optional), lastScrapedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
Add ContentPost model with fields: id, sourceId (FK), platform, authorName, authorUrl, content, postUrl, postedAt, scrapedAt, topics (JSON string)
Add Persona model with fields: id, name, role (ceo|cto|cro|custom), contextMarkdown, createdAt, updatedAt
Add ContentSuggestion model with fields: id, personaId (FK), contentPostId (FK), suggestion, angle, hookIdea, status (pending|used|dismissed), createdAt
Generate and run migration successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Foundation models for the entire content intelligence pipeline

userStories.title: Build Twitter scraping integration via Apify
userStories.description: As a user, I want to scrape latest posts from tracked Twitter accounts using Apify.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/apifyTwitter.js with function to scrape latest tweets from a Twitter profile URL
Use Apify Twitter scraper actor
Parse and store results as ContentPost records linked to the ContentSource
Create API route POST /api/content-sources/sync-twitter that triggers scraping for all Twitter sources
Handle rate limits and errors gracefully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reuse existing Apify client pattern from src/lib/apify.js

userStories.title: Build LinkedIn post scraping for content intelligence
userStories.description: As a user, I want to scrape latest posts from tracked LinkedIn accounts for content inspiration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/apifyLinkedInContent.js that fetches recent posts from a LinkedIn profile
Reuse existing Apify LinkedIn scraper pattern but store results as ContentPost records
Create API route POST /api/content-sources/sync-linkedin that triggers scraping for all LinkedIn content sources
Deduplicate posts by postUrl
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Leverage existing apify.js patterns for LinkedIn scraping

userStories.title: Build RSS feed parser for blog tracking
userStories.description: As a user, I want to track blogs via RSS feeds and automatically pull in new posts.
acceptanceCriteria: Install rss-parser package
Create src/lib/rssFetcher.js with function to parse RSS feed URL and return structured post data
Create API route POST /api/content-sources/sync-rss that fetches and stores new blog posts for all RSS sources
Store each RSS item as a ContentPost with platform=blog
Deduplicate by postUrl to avoid re-importing
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build Persona management UI and API
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and manage personas (CEO, CTO, CRO) with company context via markdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Create API routes: GET/POST /api/personas, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/personas/[id]
Create src/app/personas/page.js with UI to list, create, edit, and delete personas
Each persona has: name, role dropdown (CEO/CTO/CRO/Custom), and a large markdown textarea for company context
Include preset templates for CEO (vision/strategy), CTO (technical/innovation), CRO (revenue/growth)
Style consistent with existing Apple-inspired design system
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The markdown context is what gives the LLM the voice and angle for each persona

userStories.title: Build Content Sources management UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add and manage tracked content sources (LinkedIn profiles, Twitter handles, Blog RSS feeds).
acceptanceCriteria: Create API routes: GET/POST /api/content-sources, DELETE /api/content-sources/[id]
Create src/app/content-sources/page.js with UI to list all sources grouped by platform
Add form to create new source with fields: name, platform selector (LinkedIn/Twitter/Blog), URL, RSS feed URL (shown only for Blog)
Show last scraped timestamp for each source
Add Sync All button that triggers scraping for all sources
Style consistent with existing design system
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build Content Feed page showing all scraped content
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a unified feed of all scraped content from LinkedIn, Twitter, and blogs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create API route GET /api/content-feed with pagination and platform filter
Create src/app/content-feed/page.js showing all ContentPosts in reverse chronological order
Add platform filter tabs: All | LinkedIn | Twitter | Blogs
Each card shows: author name, platform icon, content preview (truncated), posted date, source name
Clicking a card expands to show full content
Style consistent with existing design system
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build LLM content suggestion engine
userStories.description: As a user, I want the LLM to analyze scraped content and generate posting suggestions tailored to each persona.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/contentSuggestionEngine.js that takes a batch of ContentPosts + a Persona and generates suggestions
Use Gemini API (reuse pattern from llmEvaluator.js) with structured JSON output
Each suggestion includes: suggested post text, angle/hook, why this topic matters for the persona, source reference
Create API route POST /api/suggestions/generate that accepts personaId and generates suggestions from recent unseen content
Store suggestions as ContentSuggestion records
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The persona contextMarkdown is injected into the LLM prompt as system context

userStories.title: Build Suggestions dashboard UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view, filter, and act on AI-generated content suggestions per persona.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/suggestions/page.js showing all suggestions grouped by persona
Add persona selector dropdown to filter suggestions
Each suggestion card shows: suggested post text, angle, source post reference, and action buttons (Use/Dismiss)
Add Generate New Suggestions button that triggers the LLM engine for selected persona
Dismissed suggestions are hidden but recoverable
Style consistent with existing design system
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Content Intelligence nav items to sidebar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to navigate to the new content intelligence pages from the sidebar.
acceptanceCriteria: Add nav items to layout.js sidebar: Content Sources, Content Feed, Personas, Suggestions
Use appropriate icons for each section
Group under a Content Intelligence section header in the sidebar
Active page highlighted correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Should be added below existing nav items
